entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `event_instance_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `event_title` TEXT NOT NULL, `meeting_start_utc` INTEGER NOT NULL, `alarm_fire_utc` INTEGER NOT NULL, `request_code` INTEGER NOT NULL, `state` TEXT NOT NULL, `calendar_id` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_scheduled_alarm_event_instance_id
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_scheduled_alarm_event_instance_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`event_instance_id`)

indices.name: index_scheduled_alarm_request_code
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_scheduled_alarm_request_code` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`request_code`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
